Vulnerabilities.Title: nginx: Remote Code Execution via crafted HTTP request
Vulnerabilities.Description: A buffer overflow vulnerability in nginx 1.18.0 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted HTTP request to the server.

Vulnerabilities.Title: openssl: Memory corruption in X.509 certificate verification
Vulnerabilities.Description: A memory corruption vulnerability in OpenSSL 3.0.2 X.509 certificate verification could allow a remote attacker to cause a denial of service or potentially execute arbitrary code.

Vulnerabilities.Title: curl: HSTS bypass via IDN
Vulnerabilities.Description: curl before 7.88.0 allows HSTS bypass via an IDN host name. An attacker can use an internationalized domain name to redirect traffic.

Vulnerabilities.Title: openssl: Timing side-channel in RSA decryption
Vulnerabilities.Description: A timing side-channel vulnerability in RSA decryption in OpenSSL allows a local attacker to recover private key material.

Vulnerabilities.Title: bash: Minor information disclosure in error messages
Vulnerabilities.Description: bash 5.1.16 discloses minor path information in error messages that could aid an attacker in reconnaissance.
